reaction_characterization.notes: Reaction-based timings include human response delay. Use these as bench-tuning targets until video-based pedal contact and release timings are captured.

notes.current_setup: The runtime supports up to four PCA9685 boards sharing the Arduino I2C bus as one 64-channel global space. The current bench setup uses 62 actuators: channels 0 through 60 are piano keys and channel 61 is the sustain pedal, one position higher than the highest note.
notes.wiring_assumption: Global channels 0 through 15 live on the first configured PCA9685 address, 16 through 31 on the second, 32 through 47 on the third, and 48 through 63 on the fourth.
notes.future_setup: The committed default mapping now matches the current 62-actuator bench. If one machine needs local tweaks, it can still save a calibrated_mapping.json override without changing the repo default for everyone else.
